title: Shad's FPS Booster
description: Pure FPS Boost! Load it up, Edit It And Enjoy.
body:
# IMPORTANT
IF ITS CRASHING 
GO TO MODPACK SETTINGS (JAVA AND MEMORY)
AND WRITE THIS JAVA ARGUMENT
# ARGUMENT
-Dorg.lwjgl.system.stackSize=1024 -Xss4M -Xmx6G -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:+UnlockExperimentalVMOptions -XX:G1NewSizePercent=20 -XX:G1ReservePercent=20 -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=50 -XX:+DisableExplicitGC -XX:+AlwaysPreTouch -XX:+UseFastUnorderedTimeStamps -Dusing.aikars.flags=mcflags.emc.gs

# PURE PERFORMANCE MODPACK
Lagging On Minecraft Or Experiencing Lag Spikes?
No Problem, This Supports Even Low End PC's.
Im On A Ryzen 5 7600 And A NVIDIA 3080 GPU. And Im Getting 1000+ FPS! Try It Yourself.
